title: CobblemonExposureLoot
description: Changes the Exposure mod's loot photographs to fit with Cobblemon
body: Y'know those little aged photographs you sometimes find in chests when playing with the Exposure mod? ....No? Oh. Well those exist and this resourcepack changes them to be Cobblemon-focused. I made this for a personal pack and figured, eh, someone would get a kick out of this.
